mechanism: Broad kinase inhibition including FLT3 (and BCR-ABL) to block oncogenic signaling
additional_notes: Stated as explored in AML; broad kinase inhibition incl. FLT3

mechanism: Inhibits SRC-family kinases and ABL to interfere with survival signaling
additional_notes: Rationale: SRC-family signaling implicated in AML survival

mechanism: Inhibits JAK1/2 to suppress JAK/STAT pathway signaling
additional_notes: Existing use mentioned: myelofibrosis; noted for subset activity and combination rationale

mechanism: Inhibits MEK1/2 in the RAS/MAPK pathway to reduce proliferation
additional_notes: Rationale references RAS/MAPK axis suppression in AML contexts

mechanism: Inhibits mTORC1 to dampen PI3K/AKT/mTOR signaling and growth
Selectively inhibits PI3K delta to reduce downstream survival signaling
additional_notes: Rationale: PI3K signaling in hematologic malignancies

mechanism: Inhibits the proteasome leading to proteostasis stress and apoptosis
additional_notes: Note: synergy reported with chemotherapy in AML

mechanism: Inhibits histone deacetylases to alter chromatin/epigenetic programs

category: HDAC modulator (weak HDAC inhibitor at high concentration)

mechanism: Raises lysosomal pH and impairs autophagic flux
additional_notes: Rationale: autophagy dependence and combination rationale

mechanism: Targets ALDH-related vulnerabilities and increases oxidative stress; activity often enhanced with copper

mechanism: Inhibits mitochondrial respiratory chain complex I causing energetic stress and altered metabolism
